title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — kubernetes.io/service-name
text:
Type: Label
Example:
kubernetes.io/service-name: "my-website"
Used on: EndpointSlice
Kubernetes associates
EndpointSlices
with
Services
using this label.
This label records the
name
of the
Service that the EndpointSlice is backing. All EndpointSlices should have this label set to
the name of their associated Service.
